corrections.text: In "Why It Matters," the article attributes the statement that the findings broaden the evidence base to include patients undergoing mastectomy and those with larger T3 tumors to CancerNetwork's "senomac-reveals-omitting-alnd-yields-non-inferior-survival-in-breast-cancer" article. That specific article does not contain this point. The claim is accurate and is supported by the other cited CancerNetwork article ("omitting-alnd-non-inferiority-fewer-arm-related-complications-breast-cancer"), which reports that prior trials "excluded important subgroups, most notably patients undergoing mastectomy or those with larger primary tumors exceeding 5 cm," as well as by The ASCO Post and OncoDaily. The fact stands; only the cited URL is incorrect.
